zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Scrope於1394年5月31日出生在英國越可爾博爾頓時，他的父親Roger Scrope 2nd Baron Scrope of Bolton47歲，母親Margaret Tibetot29歲。他於1413年與Margaret Neville結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1420年8月29日在法國諾門迪盧享年26歲，埋葬在英國越可爾易亞斯比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard Scrope于1394年5月31日出生在英国越可爾博爾頓时，他的父亲Roger Scrope 2nd Baron Scrope of Bolton47岁，母亲Margaret Tibetot29岁。他于1413年与Margaret Neville结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1420年8月29日在法国諾門迪盧享年26岁，埋葬在英国越可爾易亞斯比。

nameMeanings.name: Scrope
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman: of uncertain origin. Tengvik suggests derivation from the Old Scandinavian personal name Skrópi (of doubtful etymology, but compare Old Scandinavian skrópa-maðr ‘hypocrite’, containing the genitive plural form of skrópar ‘sham, hypocrisy’). It is possible, but not certain, that this personal name forms the first element of the Notts place-name Scrooby. Otherwise there is no evidence for its currency in England or, more relevantly, in Normandy. Richards Castle (in Herefs and Shrops) was apparently named after Richard Scrope, who held estates in Herefs and Worcs in 1066 and was a Norman favourite of Edward the Confessor. The Scrope family, whose name is traditionally pronounced /skru:p/, was politically important in medieval England, and acquired estates in Lincs (Barton on Humber), NR Yorks (Castle Bolton), and in ER Yorks (Flotmanby). Richard (le) Scrope of Bolton, in Wensleydale, was Lord Chancellor in the reign of Richard II. The use of le and de in the surname, suggesting either a nickname or a locative name, must be treated with caution because these were often added gratuitously to Anglo-Norman surnames as a sign of high social status.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Scrope was born on 31 May 1394, in Bolton, Yorkshire, England, his father, Roger Scrope 2nd Baron Scrope of Bolton, was 47 and his mother, Margaret Tibetot, was 29. He married Margaret Neville in 1413. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 29 August 1420, in Rouen, Normandy, France, at the age of 26, and was buried in Easby, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Scrope est né le 31 mai 1394, à Bolton, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Roger Scrope 2nd Baron Scrope of Bolton, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Margaret Tibetot, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Neville en 1413. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 29 août 1420, à Rouen, Normandie, France, à l’âge de 26 ans, et a été enterré à Easby, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Richard Scrope am 31. Mai 1394 in Bolton, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Scrope 2nd Baron Scrope of Bolton 47 und seine Mutter Margaret Tibetot 29. Er hat 1413 Margaret Neville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 29. August 1420 im Alter von 26 Jahren in Rouen, Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Easby, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Scrope è nato il il 31 maggio 1394 nel Bolton, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Roger Scrope 2nd Baron Scrope of Bolton, aveva 47 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Tibetot, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Neville nel 1413. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 29 agosto 1420, nel Rouen, Normandie, Francia, all'età di 26 anni, e fu sepolto a Easby, Yorkshire, England.

ja.St Agatha Abbey, Easby, Yorkshire, Engla: イギリスヨークシュアイアエアスビー
ja.Rouen, Normandy, France: フランスノーマンディロウン
ja.Bolton, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアボルトン
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Scropeが1394年5月31日にイギリスヨークシュアイアボルトンで生まれた時，父Roger Scrope 2nd Baron Scrope of Boltonは47歳，母Margaret Tibetotは29歳であった。1413年にMargaret Nevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1420年8月29日にフランスノーマンディロウンで26歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアエアスビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Scrope(이)가 1394년 5월 31일 영국 요르크실르 볼턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Scrope 2nd Baron Scrope of Bolton(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Tibetot(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1413년 Margaret Neville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1420년 8월 29일 프랑스 노먼디 루언에서 26세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 이스비에 묻혔다.

mn.31 May 1394–29 August 1420: 1394 оны Тавдугаар сарын 31–1420 оны Наймдугаар сарын 29

pt.31 May 1394–29 August 1420: 31 de maio de 1394–29 de agosto de 1420
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Scrope nasceu em 31 de maio de 1394, em Bolton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger Scrope 2nd Baron Scrope of Bolton, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Tibetot, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Neville em 1413. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 29 de agosto de 1420, em Rouen, Normandie, França, com 26 anos, e foi sepultado em Easby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Scrope родился 31 мая 1394 г. в местности болтон, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger Scrope 2nd Baron Scrope of Bolton было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Tibetot, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Neville в 1413 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 29 августа 1420 г. в местности роуен, норманди, Франция в возрасте 26 лет и был похоронен в местности эасби, еркшир, Англия.

es.31 May 1394–29 August 1420: 31 de mayo de 1394–29 de agosto de 1420
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Richard Scrope nació el 31 de mayo de 1394, en Bolton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger Scrope 2nd Baron Scrope of Bolton, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Margaret Tibetot, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Margaret Neville en 1413. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 29 de agosto de 1420, en Rouen, Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 26 años, y fue sepultado en Easby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
